scholarships.name: Tylenol Future Care Scholarship
scholarships.description: For students pursuing a career in healthcare. Open to high school seniors and current college students. Strong community service record encouraged.

scholarships.name: Kansas State Scholarship
scholarships.description: State-funded award for Kansas residents demonstrating financial need. Renewable for up to 4 years at accredited Kansas colleges and universities.

scholarships.name: Kansas Farm Bureau Agricultural Scholarship
scholarships.description: Scholarship for Kansas high school seniors pursuing agricultural-related fields of study at Kansas colleges and universities.

scholarships.name: Kansas Press Association Scholarship
scholarships.description: Scholarship for Kansas students pursuing journalism or communications at accredited colleges and universities.

scholarships.name: First-Generation College Student Scholarship
scholarships.description: National scholarship specifically for first-generation college students from any state pursuing higher education.

scholarships.name: Kansas Nurses Association Foundation Scholarship
scholarships.description: Scholarship for Kansas high school graduates pursuing registered nursing or advanced nursing degrees at accredited institutions.

scholarships.name: National Music Teachers Association Scholarship
scholarships.description: Scholarship for music education students and aspiring musicians planning to pursue music at the collegiate level.

scholarships.name: Gates Scholarship
scholarships.description: Highly selective scholarship for exceptional minority students with significant financial need. Covers full cost of attendance at any U.S. college.

scholarships.name: Kansas Health Care Foundation Scholarship
scholarships.description: Scholarship for Kansas students pursuing healthcare careers including nursing, medicine, and allied health professions.

scholarships.name: Do Something Student Leadership Scholarship
scholarships.description: National scholarship recognizing student-led community service projects and demonstrated leadership in local communities.

scholarships.name: Coca-Cola Scholars Program
scholarships.description: One of the most prestigious national scholarships for high school seniors. Merit-based, awarded to 150 students annually. Strong community leadership record required.

scholarships.name: Horatio Alger National Scholarship
scholarships.description: For students who have overcome great obstacles. Applicants must demonstrate integrity, perseverance, and financial need.

scholarships.name: Horatio Alger Association Kansas Scholarship
scholarships.description: Merit-based scholarship for Kansas high school seniors who have overcome significant obstacles and demonstrate financial need.

scholarships.name: Prudential Spirit of Community Award
scholarships.description: Honors high school students for outstanding volunteer service. Each state selects two Distinguished Finalists who receive $1,000 each.

scholarships.name: Elks National Foundation Most Valuable Student
scholarships.description: One of the largest scholarship competitions in the country. Open to U.S. citizens in their final year of high school. Based on scholarship, leadership, and financial need.

scholarships.name: Dell Scholars Program
scholarships.description: For students who demonstrate the drive to succeed despite facing difficult circumstances. Includes ongoing support resources through college.

scholarships.name: Burger King Scholars Program
scholarships.description: Open to high school seniors. No minimum GPA required - focuses on community service and financial need. Very accessible application.

scholarships.name: Scholly Scholarship Search
scholarships.description: Scholly matches students to hundreds of scholarships based on their background, interests, and goals. Free to search the database.

scholarships.name: Fastweb Scholarship Database
scholarships.description: One of the largest free scholarship search databases. Create a profile and get matched to scholarships you qualify for.

scholarships.name: Ron Brown Scholar Program
scholarships.description: Academically gifted African American students who display exceptional leadership potential, participate in community service, and demonstrate financial need.

scholarships.name: KCUR Missouri Valley Journalism Scholarship
scholarships.description: For Kansas and Missouri students pursuing journalism, communications, or media studies. Includes mentorship with KCUR public radio staff.

scholarships.name: Kansas 4-H Foundation Scholarship
scholarships.description: For Kansas students who have been active 4-H members for at least 3 years. Preference given to students continuing involvement in agriculture or community development.

scholarships.name: Kansas Grain and Feed Association Scholarship
scholarships.description: For Kansas students pursuing degrees in agriculture, agribusiness, or related fields. Strong ties to Kansas farming communities encouraged.

scholarships.name: Davidson Fellows Scholarship
scholarships.description: For students 18 and under who have completed a significant piece of work in science, technology, engineering, mathematics, literature, music, or philosophy.

scholarships.name: Hispanic Scholarship Fund
scholarships.description: For Hispanic students with a minimum 3.0 GPA pursuing a degree at an accredited U.S. college or university. Financial need is considered.

scholarships.name: Kansas City Royals Baseball Scholarship
scholarships.description: For graduating high school seniors in the greater Kansas City area demonstrating academic achievement, financial need, and community involvement.

scholarships.name: Sunflower Foundation Scholarship
scholarships.description: For Kansas students pursuing careers in health professions. Supports students committed to serving rural and underserved Kansas communities.

scholarships.name: Kansas Rural Water Association Scholarship
scholarships.description: Kansas-specific scholarship for students interested in water science, environmental engineering, or rural development. Open to Kansas high school seniors.

scholarships.name: Kansas Masonic Foundation Scholarship
scholarships.description: For Kansas high school seniors with academic achievement and community involvement. Multiple awards given annually across the state.

scholarships.name: Kansas Ethnic Minority Scholarship
scholarships.description: For academically talented minority students who are Kansas residents enrolled or planning to enroll at a Kansas postsecondary institution.
